sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54773" key="katapepukasme/nws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπεπῠκασμένως</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πυκάζω</etym>) <sense id="n54773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covertly, slily</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
